intent: Spin up a dedicated eMBB slice to support the 4K video streaming service rolling out next week.
We have a new emergency services contract. Provision a URLLC slice with strict latency guarantees before Thursday.
The port authority needs isolated connectivity for autonomous crane operations. Get a slice up for them.
Allocate a network slice for the temporary field hospital being set up outside the city.
Mining company onboarding next month requires a private slice for underground sensor telemetry.
New enterprise customer signed up for isolated slice service. Please instantiate their NSI.
The broadcast partner needs a dedicated slice for live event transmission at the national arena this weekend.
Set up a mMTC slice to handle the smart meter rollout across the southern district.
The drone delivery pilot program is wrapping up. Release the slice we provisioned for it.
Contract with the logistics company has expired. Tear down their network slice instance.
Shut down the slice allocated for the music festival; the event ended yesterday.
The enterprise trial slice is past its end date. Please decommission it and reclaim the resources.
We no longer have an SLA with the retail chain. Remove their slice from the network.
Decommission the legacy IoT slice that was migrated to the new platform last quarter.
The emergency drill slice was only needed for 48 hours. It can be terminated now.
Pull up the full inventory of slices running on the network right now.
I need a quick overview of all active NSIs before the capacity planning meeting.
What slices do we currently have provisioned for the northern region?
Show me all slices along with their current load and status.
Get me the slice inventory. I need to verify how many enterprise slices are active.
List all network slice instances — just names and IDs, no performance data needed.
Display all provisioned slices including their service type and current state.
The stadium slice is hitting its device registration cap ahead of the championship game. Raise the UE limit.
Connected device count on the industrial IoT slice needs to go up to accommodate new sensor deployments.
Reduce the maximum UE quota on the guest Wi-Fi offload slice — we're overshooting our license.
The university campus slice is seeing more devices than expected during the semester start. Expand the UE cap.
We onboarded extra devices for the warehouse automation project. Update the UE limit on their slice accordingly.
Lower the device quota on the slice we share with the roaming partner — they are no longer sending as much traffic.
Conference venue slice needs a higher UE ceiling for the international trade show next week.
Concurrent session usage on the V2X slice is frequently peaking. Bump the PDU session ceiling.
The AR/VR slice for the theme park attraction keeps hitting session limits on busy weekends. Increase the quota.
Scale back the PDU session cap on the testing slice now that the trial phase is over.
Session establishment failures are climbing on the logistics fleet slice. We need to raise the concurrent session limit.
Smart grid slice needs a higher PDU session allowance before the grid management software update launches.
Cut the PDU session quota on the deprecated video surveillance slice in half — we are decommissioning cameras in batches.
Throughput on the eMBB slice is degrading at the downtown gNodeBs. Push more resource blocks to it.
The private network slice for the automobile plant needs a larger RB share during the night shift.
Reduce the RB ratio assigned to the low-priority bulk data slice to free up capacity for critical services.
Live video uplink quality is poor on the public safety slice. Increase its resource block allocation at the affected cell.
The RAN team flagged that the MBB slice is underutilizing its RB allocation. Trim it back to realistic levels.
Rebalance RB shares between the two enterprise slices on site B — one is starving while the other sits idle.
Too many RRC connections are being established on the commercial slice group at the train station gNB. Set a tighter cap.
Raise the RRC connection limit for the MCPTT slice — first responders need more simultaneous connections during major incidents.
gNodeB at the airport is getting overloaded with RRC signaling. Apply a connected user limit to the public slice group.
The RRC connection ceiling for the URLLC slice group is too conservative for the new robot fleet. Increase it.
Update the maximum allowed RRC users per slice group at gNB-07 ahead of the sporting event this Saturday.
We're seeing intermittent S1-U bearer drops on the core transport links. Can you check if there's a routing issue?
Multiple customers in district 4 are reporting high latency since the software upgrade rolled out last night.
Can you pull the throughput KPIs for gNB cluster 12 over the past 24 hours?
There's a critical alarm on the MME. What's the recommended procedure before we escalate to the vendor?
